{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = pistol (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Albadol Crane]] used a pistol.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|An alchemist managed to make a pistol work on the castle grounds despite its defenses.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
